title: AI Writing Coach: Sci-Fi Micro-Fiction
description: Write a short science fiction story (50-120 words) about a discovery on Mars. Get instant encouraging AI feedback.
prompt: Write a short story about an astronaut who discovers something unexpected inside an ancient dome on Mars.
systemPrompt: Focus on atmospheric description, clear reveal of the discovery, and good word count control.

criteria.name: Atmosphere
criteria.description: Describe the setting inside the ancient dome to build suspense or wonder.
criteria.tip: Use details like cold air, ancient dust, glowing structures, or absolute silence.

criteria.name: The Discovery
criteria.description: Clearly reveal what unexpected thing the astronaut found.
criteria.tip: It could be a fossilized plant, a alien machine still huming, or a human artifact.

criteria.name: Length & Flow
criteria.description: Keep it concise (50-120 words) with smooth transitions.
criteria.tip: Vary sentence lengths to create rhythm and check your spelling.
